LanguageData.VQE_FrozenEmptyCryptosleepPod.label: empty ancient cryptosleep pod
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenEmptyCryptosleepPod.descriptio: An old cryptosleep pod that has been opened. Whatever was inside is long gone.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFailedCryptosleepPod.label: failed cryptosleep pod
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFailedCryptosleepPod.descripti: A cryptosleep pod that suffered a critical failure. The occupant inside is long dead and most likely turned into dust.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFadingCryptosleepPod.label: fading cryptosleep pod
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFadingCryptosleepPod.descripti: A heavily damaged cryptosleep pod that is barely functioning. The occupant inside is still alive but in danger.
